task: Create the src/middleware folder if it does not exist and inside it add a new file fortress.js that uses CommonJS to export three things—(1) an Express middleware function that sets the standard security headers and, only when process.env.FORTRESS_HSTS === 'true', adds a Strict‐Transport‐Security header, (2) an async Koa middleware (ctx, next) that applies the same headers, and (3) an Express Router named router with a GET /status/fo endpoint returning status 200 and JSON { status: "ok", fortress: true }.
